qa_pairs.question: What are the minimum requirements for project and nearline storage when applying for the Resource Allocation Competition (RAC)?
qa_pairs.answer: For project storage on General Purpose clusters (Fir, Nibi, Rorqual, Narval), the minimum is 41 TB, calculated as the sum of all project storage needed across these clusters. For nearline storage on these same clusters, the minimum is 101 TB, also as a sum across clusters. Any amount of project storage on the Trillium cluster or nearline storage on the HPSS cluster must be requested through RAC, as the general minimums do not apply to these specific clusters. If an applicant needs both project and nearline storage, at least one of the requests must meet or exceed its specified minimum to be eligible.

qa_pairs.question: How should an applicant submit a request for various cloud resources within a single cloud site through the Resource Allocation Competition (RAC)?
qa_pairs.answer: When applying for cloud resources in a particular cloud site, if at least one of the requested resources (e.g., Compute Cloud VCPU, Persistent Cloud VCPU, Volume and Snapshot Storage, etc.) meets or exceeds its specific minimum requirement, the entire request for that cloud site becomes eligible. In such a scenario, the online application form must include all the cloud resources needed on that site, even if some individual resource amounts are below their listed minimums.

qa_pairs.question: What should an applicant do if their project requires some computational resources that are below the minimum eligibility for the Resource Allocation Competition (RAC)?
qa_pairs.answer: If a project's need for certain computational resources can be met by the Rapid Access Service (RAS) because the requested amount is below the RAC minimum, those specific resources should not be included in the RAC application. Only resources that meet or exceed the specified RAC minimums should be formally requested through the RAC process. For example, if a project needs 180 core-years (below RAC minimum) and 50 TB of project storage (above RAC minimum) on Fir, only the 50 TB of storage should be requested in the RAC application.
